request_payload.exposure_text: As a former senior defense analyst, I've seen firsthand how strategic autonomy protects us. When allies hesitate, we need reliable partners—not just promises. Let's invest in our own security so we're never left vulnerable again. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
